pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh checks for case directory name 'Steganography_Triage_2024*'

export_result.sh explicitly reads from this directory to build the ground truth

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected steganography data; setup_task.sh generates a base JPEG and appends suspicious strings ('SUSPICIOUS_APPENDED_DATA_BLOCK_A_192837465' and 'ENCRYPTED_ZIP_ARCHIVE_HEADER_PK\x03\x04\x00\x00\x00') before writing them to the /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd disk image via mcopy. It was explicitly verified that the case name ('Steganography_Triage_2024'), extraction directory ('/home/ga/Reports/extracted_jpegs'), CSV report path ('/home/ga/Reports/steg_analysis.csv'), and summary report path ('/home/ga/Reports/steg_summary.txt') exactly match the task description instructions and export_result.sh validation checks.
